title: Harrison, Sarah - Chief Operating Officer, the Cabinet Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Sarah Harrison is due to leave her role at the Cabinet Office in November 2025.  Chief Executive, Building Societies Association  Sarah Harrison sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the Building Societies Association. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2025; and the appointment was announced later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
